od_description: Magarmal Bagh / Jehangir Chowk ↔ Safa Kadal via Karan Nagar. A short central-Srinagar route.
stops_verdict: Short route with high dwell share (55%) — many closely-spaced central-city stops; genuine boarding points.
narrative: Magarmal Bagh (adjoins Jehangir Chowk) ↔ Safa Kadal, 3.5 km. FDR-122 'Jehangir Chowk to Soura' has higher overlap (0.80) but is 10 km and continues to Soura — wrong length/endpoint. FDR-575 'Safakadal to Jehangir Chowk' matches BOTH endpoints and length (permit 3.15 km ≈ observed 3.5 km), so it is the correct match despite 0.67 overlap. Another case of endpoint+length beating raw overlap. 40 runs / 5 drivers.
evidence_used: geocoded endpoints: Magarmal Bagh≈Jehangir Chowk (A), Safa Kadal (B), Karan Nagar (mid)
FDR-575 'Safakadal to Jehangir Chowk' — endpoint AND length match (3.15 km vs 3.5 km)
rejected FDR-122 (0.80) — continues to Soura, 10 km
data_quality_flags: implied_headway 214 min is a partial-adoption artifact
